g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain LangChain LLMs and Chat Models — how do I use them?')
sendPrompt('Explain LangChain Prompt Templates with examples')
sendPrompt('What are LangChain Output Parsers and how do I use them?')
sendPrompt('Explain LangChain Expression Language (LCEL) — the pipe operator, runnables, and how to compose chains')
sendPrompt('What are LangChain Chains? Explain LLMChain, SequentialChain, and how to build custom chains')
sendPrompt('Explain LangChain Retrieval chains and RAG — how do I build a retrieval-augmented generation pipeline?')
sendPrompt('Explain LangChain Document Loaders — which loaders are available and how do I use them?')
sendPrompt('Explain LangChain Text Splitters — RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter and chunking strategies')
sendPrompt('Explain LangChain Embeddings and vector stores — how do I embed and store documents?')
sendPrompt('What are LangChain vector stores? Explain FAISS, Chroma, Pinecone')
sendPrompt('Explain LangChain Memory types — ConversationBufferMemory, summary memory, and how to add memory to a chain')
sendPrompt('Explain LangChain Agents — what are agents, tools, and how does the ReAct agent work?')
sendPrompt('Explain LangChain Tools — built-in tools like search, Python REPL, and how to create custom tools')
sendPrompt('What is LangGraph? How does it differ from LangChain chains and when should I use it?')
sendPrompt('Explain LangChain Callbacks and tracing — how do I debug and observe my LangChain app?')
sendPrompt('What is LangSmith and how do I use it to evaluate and monitor LangChain apps?')

svg.text: Click any box to dive deeper
